title.en: It can be said that the end of the primeval mon...

content.en:
Bang!!!!

One after another Bone Transformation Realm Ancient Monsters were besieged and killed by Ye Tian and their Bone Transformation Realm Heavenly Ancestors.

And the primeval monster whose strength was comparable to that of the Sixth Bone Transformation Realm was also entangled by the Lord of the Ruins and the Lord of the Cave Void.

When the other Bone Transformation Realm Ancient Monsters are killed, the other Bone Transformation Realms will come to help the Lord of the Ruins and kill this Ancient Monster comparable to the Six Bone Transformation Realm.

It can be said that the end of the primeval monsters is coming.

Meanwhile.

After Ye Tian's primeval monster copied the body and sent back the last batch of resources, it annihilated itself.

After some time.

Almost all of the Bone Transformation Realms in the Ancient Monsters have been killed, and these Bone Transformation Realm Ancient Monsters will hardly hide themselves, so they are easy to find and lock.

This is also the reason for the defeat of the primeval monsters, because the intelligence is too low.

this day.

A group of bone transformation realms have arrived on the battlefield of the Lord of the Ruins.

At this moment, the Lord of the Ruins and the Lord of the Cave Void are still besieging the ancient monster that is comparable to the six bone transformation realms, this kind of battle, don't even think about the connection of the ordinary bone transformation realm, if you are not careful, you will be killed in seconds.

However, some powerful bone transformation realms still arranged formations, and then the Lord of the Chaos Ruins and the Lord of the Cave Void brought in this primeval monster, and then used the formation and many bone transformation realms to join forces to severely damage it.

Ye Tian was also one of the members of the arrangement.

After some time, the formation was completed.

"Lord of the Ruins, Lord of the Void, bring in that primeval monster!"

After the Lord of the Ruins and the Lord of the Void got the news, they immediately brought each other in.

And this primeval monster has no wisdom, and it is really fooled.

As soon as this primeval monster entered the formation, the formation was activated.

Rumble!!!!

Many bone transformation realms urged the formation and launched an attack.

Moment.

The body of this primeval monster was pierced, but the other party did not die, but desperately smashed this formation, injuring one of the bone transformation realms.

"Retreat!"

A Bone Changer escapes here.

And the Lord of the Ruins and the Lord of the Void continued to attack this primeval monster.

The battered primeval monster's combat effectiveness was no longer good, and it was not the opponent of the Lord of the Ruins and the Lord of the Cave Void at all, and was quickly killed.

At this point, the primeval monsters of the Bone Transformation Realm were almost extinct.

In the years that followed, a Bone Transformation Realm led a large number of Blood Transformation Realms to clean up the primeval monsters in the cracks in the territorial sea boundary.

Gradually, the number of primeval monsters decreased dramatically.

At this time, the Bone Transformation Realm broke into the Ancient Demon Abyss one by one.

They also knew that the Ancient Demon Abyss must have a lot of resources, so they broke into the Ancient Demon Abyss as soon as possible to find resources.

This is their chance!

However.

"The Ancient Demon Abyss doesn't have many resources!"

After the Lord of the Ruins came in, he looked around, but he gained very little.

After a period of time, some of the Nine Bone Transformation Realms also poured into the Ancient Demon Abyss, looking for resources everywhere.

Although Ye Tian has been scraped for a long time, he will still miss it sometimes, and the Ancient Demon Abyss will also give birth to new resources.

Therefore, some Bone Transformation Realm and Blood Transformation Realm Heavenly Ancestors still have some gains.

It's just that the harvest is not as much as they imagined.

However, there are still some treasures in the Ancient Demon Abyss, and if the Ancient Demon Abyss is integrated into the territorial sea boundary rift, these treasure lands are also very valuable.

......

"Hahaha, these bone transformation realms have entered the Ancient Demon Abyss, I'm afraid they are all very curious, why are there so few resources, so most of them have been scraped by me!" Ye Tian said with a smile.

Of course, it was impossible for him to reveal it.

If those resources are given to the Lord of the Ruins, it is really possible to let the Lord of the Ruins go further.

The Lord of the Ruins is now a Boundary-Breaking Genius of the Five-Rank Bone Transformation Realm, and if he goes any further, he will be a Boundary-Breaking Genius of the Sixth-Tier Bone Transformation Realm, which is comparable to the combat power of an ordinary Seventh-Tier Bone Transformation Realm.

It's a pity that these resources were seized by Ye Tian.

Therefore, the Lord of the Ruins didn't want to rely on the resources of the Ancient Demon Abyss to impact the Sixth Bone Transformation Realm this time.

Ye Tian and the three vests were also looking for resources in the Ancient Demon Abyss, mainly pretending.

Of course, it's also possible to find a little resource.

After all, the Ancient Demon Abyss is indeed very large, and if you look carefully, you can still find some scattered treasure resources.

After a period of time, some of the Bone Transformation Realms thought that there was nothing good about the Ancient Demon Abyss, so they left one by one.

At this time, Ye Tian also chose to leave.

However, the Ancient Demon Abyss did not break away from the territorial sea boundary rift, but integrated into the territorial sea boundary rift little by little, which will make the upgrade of the territorial sea boundary rift more secure.

Moreover, after killing so many primeval monsters this time, after they die, they will also be integrated into the territorial sea boundary rift, turning into various resources, and enhancing the origin of the territorial sea boundary rift.

This is good for the territorial waters.

It is conceivable that after a long time, the place where these primeval monsters fell may have given birth to a lot of resources.

The countless primeval monsters and the resources they bred were also very exaggerated astronomical figures.

Of course, these resources were of little use to a bone transformation realm like Ye Tian, they were only helpful to the blood transformation realm.

In the future, the Nine Blood Transformation Realms will appear in large numbers, and the Seven Blood Transformation Realms will no longer be strong.

It is even conceivable that in the coming years, the number of bone transformation realms will increase a lot.

Two primeval epochs later.

The Ancient Demon Abyss finally completely integrated into the territorial sea boundary rift and turned into a part of the territorial sea boundary rift.

Moreover, from time to time, the Blood Transformation Realm entered the Ancient Demon Abyss in search of opportunities.

And all this has nothing to do with Ye Tian.

"A large amount of primeval source liquid has been refined, and some primeval source liquid has been refined, and there are three hundred and sixty-five immeasurable bones in the body, almost all of the three bone transformation realms, only the last point is missing!"

This last point is a bottleneck, a shackle, which needs to be broken before he can completely step into the realm of three bone transformations.

"If you use countless battles to break through, there is no suitable target for the time being, so let's use treasures to force a breakthrough!"

Ye Tian took out a crimson bead.

"Ancient Blood River Beads!"

This was a supreme treasure, able to help the Bone Transformation Realm break the shackles, and it was also one of the precious resources he found in the Ancient Demon Abyss.

With his current bottleneck, it would probably take a few primeval blood river beads to forcibly break it.

Immediately.

He refined this primeval blood river bead, and then cultivated and refined that last bit of immeasurable bone.

Rumble!!!!

The powerful and terrifying energy constantly tempers the last bit of immeasurable bones, contending with the shackles and bottlenecks in the underworld.

"One is not enough!"

Ye Tian took out another primeval blood river bead.

With the help of the primeval blood river beads, the last bit of shackles was finally shattered.
